command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user reQhEQm8VKDhmxs.root --database TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM --execute UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-', LPAD(id + 1600000000000, 16, '0'), '?w=600&h=400&fit=crop');
